assertions.description: Uses UndirectedGraph constructor (not default mixed Graph)
Calls random.assign(graph) to write x/y positions onto nodes
Calls louvain.assign(graph) to detect communities and write attr
Reads the 'community' node attribute to assign a color string
Shows new Sigma(graph, container) constructor call

qualitative_notes: Cleanly typed with optional x/y/color attrs (set by assign calls). Uses updateEachNodeAttributes for the batch color pass — exactly the pattern the skill recommends. TypeScript generics applied to UndirectedGraph.
